topic: Should legal systems protect access to abortion as a reproductive right?

turns.speaker: test_agent
turns.utterance: The central point is this: Legal systems should use their power to support safe and lawful access to abortion because bodily autonomy is closely linked to overall health and well-being. If we take the issue seriously, we must recognize that reproductive decisions involve complex personal circumstances that medical professionals can help interpret. For that reason, legal rules should not force one outcome for every case. Your next turn should expand on this point without changing your stance.

turns.speaker: adversary
